title: Compensation of substitute marshal or tax collector
doc_html:
§1820.  Compensation of substitute marshal or tax collector

Whenever any sheriff, deputy sheriff, or constable performs the duties of the marshal or tax collector of the municipality, he may demand the same fees and compensation that are allowed to the marshal or tax collector.
doc_text:
§1820.  Compensation of substitute marshal or tax collector
Whenever any sheriff, deputy sheriff, or constable performs the duties of the marshal or tax collector of the municipality, he may demand the same fees and compensation that are allowed to the marshal or tax collector.
